description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets GIT_DEPTH=3 and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, defines a single build stage, and adds a build_project job running on runners tagged brew, java, cocoapods, and xcode. In the build stage the job executes the exact script commands: ( brew bundle ), ( ./lib/bin/build_libsodium-macos clean && ./lib/bin/build_libsodium-macos ), ( ./lib/bin/build_libjson-c-macos clean && ./lib/bin/build_libjson-c-macos ), ( cd ./platform-independent/c/cli && ./clean && targets=all ./build && ./mpw-tests && ./mpw-cli-tests ), ( ./gradlew --stacktrace --info clean test ), ( cd platform-darwin && pod install ), ( xcodebuild -workspace platform-darwin/MasterPassword.xcworkspace -configuration 'Release' -scheme 'MasterPassword iOS' -sdk iphonesimulator clean build ), and ( xcodebuild -workspace platform-darwin/MasterPassword.xcworkspace -configuration 'Release' -scheme 'MasterPassword macOS' clean build ). No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rule triggers are defined, and the job simply runs on the specified tags.
